aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as structured schema markup and a clear service hierarchy. However, it lacks customer reviews and detailed content to enhance its visibility and authority.
quick_wins: Implement a strategy to gather and display customer reviews on the website and Google Business Profile.
Expand service pages with more detailed content and relevant keywords to improve search visibility.
Optimize meta tags and headers with targeted keywords for better search engine indexing.

gbp_analysis.found: No Google Business Profile (GBP) found based on the provided website.
gbp_analysis.summary: The absence of a GBP significantly impacts local search visibility and customer engagement.
critical_issues: No GBP means the business is missing out on local search traffic and customer reviews.
Lack of GBP makes it difficult for potential customers to find accurate business information.

nap_citations.summary: The business name, address, and phone number (NAP) are not consistently cited across the web, which affects local SEO.
action_items: Create and verify a Google Business Profile with accurate NAP information.
Ensure consistent NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
Monitor and update NAP information regularly to maintain accuracy.

schema_gaps: No Organization schema found beyond the basic LocalBusiness schema.
Missing FAQPage schema to address common customer queries.
No Review schema to showcase customer feedback and ratings.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and detailed content to establish authority and improve search rankings.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Customers searching for HVAC services in San Jose who rely on reviews and detailed service information.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review collection strategy and expanding service page content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, keyword-rich content and leveraging customer testimonials to build trust and authority.
